name: Active-Learning-Model-Comparison-Thermite-Nanomaterials
desc: Compares the performance of ML models to explore/exploit the design space of thermite nanomaterials.

name: MonCraft
desc: A Minecraft-like project developed without a game engine, featuring stunning shaders, realized through OpenGL 3.3

name: Portfolio
desc: This portfolio displays my skills on a single-page website with responsive design, developed using pure vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

name: MicroBenchmark-Julia-MATLAB-Python
desc: This benchmark compares the execution times of dynamic languages in scientific computing. It provides insights into the use of programming languages in scientific tasks.

name: Noise-Perlin-Cellular
desc: This project implements Perlin and Cellular (Voronoi) Noise in 2D/3D, interactively using OpenGL and ImGUI.

name: Interactive-Function-Approximation
desc: Interactive approximation of continuous functions using Remes, Bernstein, and Fourier methods

name: boids
desc: Simulation of flocking behavior in boids, including a predator interaction.

name: Soft-Body
desc: SFML Soft Body. You can draw your own structure easily. It also includes a model with an additional feature: pressure.

name: Raycasting
desc: SFML raycasting, complete with textured graphics and a minimap.
